retry_reason: Failure occurs when delayed node is absent or index_cnt is zero; these conditions may change later if the delayed node is created or index updated, but retrying without additional state changes would likely fail again.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to retrieve the delayed node's index_cnt and assign it to inode->index_cnt. The get/release of the delayed node is incidental to safely access its data, not the main goal. The function does not pass a reference-counted object back to the caller.
judge.retry_reason: Failure occurs when delayed node is absent or index_cnt is zero; these conditions may change later if the delayed node is created or index updated, but retrying without additional state changes would likely fail again.

final.retry_reason: Failure occurs when delayed node is absent or index_cnt is zero; these conditions may change later if the delayed node is created or index updated, but retrying without additional state changes would likely fail again.
